paths.title: Become an AI Engineer
paths.description: The complete path from math foundations through production AI systems. Master ML, deep learning, LLMs, and deployment.

paths.title: Become an Agent Engineer
paths.description: Specialize in building autonomous AI agents. From the agent loop to multi-agent swarms and production deployment.

paths.title: Master RAG
paths.description: Deep dive into Retrieval-Augmented Generation. From embeddings and vector stores to advanced chunking, reranking, and multimodal RAG.

paths.title: Production AI Systems
paths.description: Ship AI that scales. Model serving, vector databases, observability, gateways, and CI/CD for ML systems.

paths.title: AI Interview Prep
paths.description: Prepare for AI engineering interviews. Key concepts, system design, and hands-on coding across the full AI stack.
